# sql-plan-audit

> Run EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN against every query in a sqlc-style catalog and diff the plans against a baseline. Detects new full-table SCANs and TEMP B-TREE sort scans introduced by PRs. SQLite/D1-only today; engine extension noted below.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/sql/plan-audit
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/sql/plan-audit
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
